calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an adult and of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioner Deborah Sue Castro present in pro per for self and for a minor, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Deborah Sue Netsky de Castro.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Carmelo Castro Netsky.
Decree signed in open court.
